title: gayophytum diffusum var. strictipes
intro: Gayophytum diffusum var. strictipes, also known as straggly bird's clay, is a variety of the Gayophytum diffusum plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Gayophytum diffusum var. strictipes include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a salve or tincture, which can be applied topically to treat skin conditions and promote overall skin health.
